name: P31 home alignment registry
ephemeralization: One canonical source per concern; generate or verify downstream artefacts. No parallel lore. A change in a source is intentionally coupled to its sinks: CI and this file tell you which command heals or proves alignment.

sources.role: Operator-locked numbers, mission snippet, ground-truth version/schema pins, mesh URLs
Colors, type scale, motion, focus — hub/org appearances
p31.ground-truth/1.0.0 — redirects, registry invariants, Three pins
Cognitive Passport authoring (canonical); p31ca mirror is generated
BONDING Soup browser entry; bonding deploy copy via sync
Normative: p31ca registry ids = hub-app-ids HUB_ALL_CARD_ORDER; one card, one about, one appUrl
Home / prototype id order; id set must match registry
Sites + mesh/payment snapshot; `sources[]` and mesh URLs must match `p31-constants.json` and worker-allowlist names
p31.workerAllowlist/1.0.0 — named Workers + paths; inventory compares to all `wrangler.toml` under andromeda/04_SOFTWARE
Normative: OSS smart home / wearables / operator bridge; pairs with p31-constants integrations
Allowlist of markdown roots for docs/doc-library search index (p31.docIndexManifest/1.0.0)

derivations.apply: npm run apply:constants (regenerates fragments / mirrors as implemented in apply-constants.mjs)
derivations.note: canonicalNumbering and schema version must match p31-constants
Passport and p31ca public CSS must be identical after apply

derivations.verify: implicit in bonding build; run hub build after sync when shipping

derivations.note: Joint constraint: same id set in both from[] files. index.astro grid is data-driven. Spec: docs/P31-HUB-CARD-ECOSYSTEM.md

derivations.apply: When `mesh` or `payment` URLs change in p31-constants, update `p31-live-fleet.json` `meshAndPayments` (and `sources` if needed) so the bundle matches
derivations.note: verify-ecosystem.mjs compares `p31-ecosystem.json` templates, then asserts live-fleet mesh/payment block tracks constants

derivations.apply: New Worker: add `wrangler.toml` under andromeda/04_SOFTWARE, add allowlist entry (`name` = wrangler `name`). If mesh URL: p31-constants + apply:constants, then p31-live-fleet. See p31ca docs/EDGE-SECURITY.md, SECURITY-RUNBOOK.md
derivations.verify: from p31ca: npm run security:workers (also in npm run security:check after hub build in release paths)
derivations.note: verify-worker-inventory.mjs walks wrangler files; unlisted → P1. Excludes */docs/files/*. CORS heuristics in same script

derivations.verify: npm run verify:constants (integrations schema, openCatalog https, src/public/json parity)
derivations.note: Human doc: docs/P31-INTEGRATIONS-BRIDGE.md; route /integrations; ground-truth routes.integrationsBridge

derivations.verify: npm run verify:doc-index (after build:doc-index in root verify; Node uses npm minisearch, browser uses vendor UMD + worker)
derivations.note: index.json is generated; UI/worker/vendor are hand-maintained. Schema p31.docLibrary/1.0.0; p31ca public mirror = Phase 3 (PLAN-DOCUMENT-LIBRARY.md)

verifyPipeline.description: Root `package.json` `verify` = prelude + scripts in order. Update this file whenever `verify` changes.
verifyPipeline.preludeNote: Fast guard (verify-alignment.mjs): JSON + required sources. Not re-run inside `npm run verify:alignment -- --verify`.
